task_completion.visual_evidence: A new document named 'Archive' is visible in the project tree or document navigation pane.

task_completion.description: Set the ID Prefix of the new document to 'ARCH'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document properties for 'Archive' show the prefix 'ARCH', or the requirement IDs inside the 'Archive' document begin with 'ARCH-'.

task_completion.description: Identify and select 'Obsolete' requirements in the 'SRS' document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is viewing the 'SRS' document and applies a filter for 'Obsolete' in the Status column, or highlights multiple rows that have the 'Obsolete' status.

task_completion.description: Move the 'Obsolete' requirements into the 'Archive' document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Archive' document is open and populated with requirement rows, and their Status column explicitly shows 'Obsolete'.

task_completion.description: Ensure no 'Obsolete' requirements remain in the 'SRS' document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' document is shown after the move, and either a filter for 'Obsolete' shows zero results, or the visible items in the Status column do not contain 'Obsolete'.
The agent clicks File > Save, clicks a Save disk icon, or the project title/tab no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk).

integrity.description: Agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application interface (menus, buttons, document views) rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not modify JSON files directly via a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open project files (like SRS.json) in a text editor or IDE (e.g., VS Code, nano, vim) to manually cut and paste JSON objects.

integrity.description: Items were genuinely moved, not recreated as dummy text
integrity.visual_evidence: The items in the 'Archive' document contain realistic requirement text and attributes from the original SRS document, not just empty rows or manually typed dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using the ReqView application. Source document: 'SRS'. Target document to create: 'Archive' with prefix 'ARCH'. Target status to move: 'Obsolete'. The VLM must ensure that items moved to 'Archive' actually have the 'Obsolete' status and that no such items remain in 'SRS'.
